query: SELECT SUM(p.amount) as total_cobrado FROM payments p JOIN projects pr ON p.projectId = pr.id WHERE pr.dataOrigin = 'manual' AND pr.deletedAt IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT SUM(p.amount) as total_cobrado FROM payments p JOIN projects pr ON p.projectId = pr.id WHERE pr.dataOrigin = 'manual' AND pr.deletedAt IS NULL;
